League Flex Dashboard

797 matches, 26 players, and 173 champions. Stats are aggregated by real name, not summoner name.

Awards Players Champion Pools Champions Role Pools Deep Dive Teams Draft Coach Showcases Random Pool Experimental Matches

Overview

Dates are mapped from UTC timestamps into Europe/London. KDA ratio uses (kills + assists) / deaths, with zero deaths counted as one for aggregate ratios.
